name: /reschedule with no arguments shows usage (storage available)

payload.text:
Usage: /reschedule <ref_code>

Example: /reschedule REF-ABC123

Provide your booking reference to release your current time slot and pick a new one.

name: /reschedule with nonexistent ref code returns not found (storage available)

payload.text: Booking with reference **N0NEXIST** was not found. Please check your reference and try again.
